SMOKECRAFT MENTOR PORTRAIT DIRECTORY
=====================================
Drop realistic portrait photos here with these exact filenames:

  don-alejandro.jpg
  javier-esteli.jpg
  dona-jamastran.jpg
  mateo-san-andres.jpg
  maestro-rafael.jpg
  carlos-mendoza.jpg
  thomas-blackwell.jpg
  paulo-oliveira.jpg

Requirements:
- Realistic photos only. No cartoons, avatars, or illustrated faces.
- Portrait orientation preferred (3:4 ratio or taller).
- Minimum 600x800px.
- Subject should appear as a premium tobacco/cigar expert.
